title: ranunculus trichophyllus var. radians
intro: Ranunculus trichophyllus var. radians, also known as the creeping buttercup, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Ranunculus trichophyllus var. radians include treating skin conditions, wounds, and urinary tract infections, as well as reducing fever and pain. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
